subcodes.first_line: O servant of Husayn that was! This is the Day which hath been mentioned in the Books, Scriptures and divine Tablets as the Day of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد قبل حسین امروز روزیست که در کتب و زبر و صحف الهی بیوم الله مذکور و
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @knowledge; recognition of God, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Word of God is its own standard
